chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-176 of 2025 Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.05.2025 Applicant present in person in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-176 of 2025 and Respondent No.4 in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221/2025. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi and Ms. Qurat-ul-Ain Morio Advocates for Respondent No.5 along with Respondent No.5 in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-176/2025 and Applicant in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221/2025. Respondent No.5 in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 221/2025 present in person. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with DSP Inayat Ali Qureshi SDPO Baldia, Inspector Ghulam Abbas Babar SHO PS Bhitai Nagar and SIP Muneer Ahmed PS Bhitai Nagar. -.-.-. In light of the Report filed by the police officials in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-176/2025 since the case has been disposed of as per the Report filed by the SDPO Baldia Hyderabad, the present Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-176/2025 has become infructuous and therefore is disposed of. Let this matter be de-tagged from Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221/2025 which is an application filed u/s 491 Cr.P.C. and deal with the case of a detenue Tehzeeb Ahmed @ Abu Talha son of Nazir Ahmed Birmani. It transpires that since last three months the son of the Applicant/Detenue has been missing and no progress has been made by the police authorities. Therefore, the SSP Hyderabad is directed to personally look into this matter and file a personal Report in this matter along with production of the detenue on the next date.

It transpires that since last three months the son of the Applicant/Detenue has been missing and no progress has been made by the police authorities. Therefore, the SSP Hyderabad is directed to personally look into this matter and file a personal Report in this matter along with production of the detenue on the next date. In case of failure SSP Hyderabad shall be present in person along with explanation. Adjourned to 15.05.2025. J U D G E Ali Haider
